---
title: "Project Setup"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#Check if java 17 is installed and, if not, give instructions on how to do so for user's OS.
os <- Sys.info()[["sysname"]]

check_java <- function() {
  java_version_out <- tryCatch(
    system2("java", "-version", stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE),
    error = function(e) return(NULL)
  )
  if (is.null(java_version_out)) return("None")
  return(java_version_out[1])
}

current_version <- check_java()
is_java_17 <- grepl("17\\.", current_version)

cat("--- JAVA DIAGNOSTIC ---\n")
cat("Operating System:", os, "\n")
cat("Detected Java:  ", current_version, "\n\n")

if (!is_java_17) {
  cat("You are already on Java 17. You are good to go for Spark!")
} else {
  cat("Java 17 not detected. Please run the following command in your terminal:\n\n")
  
  if (os == "Darwin") { # macOS
    cat("Using Homebrew:\n")
    cat("brew install openjdk@17\n")
    cat("sudo ln -sfn /usr/local/opt/openjdk@17/libexec/openjdk.jdk /Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/openjdk-17.jdk\n")
    cat("\nNote: if you do not have homebrew installed you can download it here:\n")
    cat("https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/releases\n")
    cat("or by using the following shell prompt:\n")
    cat("/bin/bash -c \"$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)\"\n")
    
  } else if (os == "Linux") {
    cat("Using Apt (Ubuntu/Debian):\n")
    cat("sudo apt update && sudo apt install openjdk-17-jdk")
    
  } else if (os == "Windows") {
    cat("Using Winget (Run in PowerShell):\n")
    cat("winget install Oracle.JDK.17\n\n")
    cat("Or download the MSI installer here:\n")
    cat("[https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/#java17](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/#java17)")
  }
}

#clear saved variables (no functionality for user)
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r}
#Install required libraries and instantiate them in environment
if (!require(aws.s3)) install.packages("aws.s3") else message("S3 installed previously.")
if (!require(sparklyr)) install.packages("sparklyr") else message("SparklyR installed previously.")
if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr") else message("dplyr installed previously.")

library(aws.s3)
library(sparklyr)
library(dplyr)
message("Libraries successfully instantiated.")
```

```{r}
if (nrow(spark_installed_versions() |> dplyr::filter(spark == "3.5.0")) == 0) {
  spark_install(version = "3.5")
    message("Spark 3.5 has been installed.")
} else {
  message("Spark 3.5 is already installed.")
}
```
